server, from 8am to 12pm on Saturday, August 17, 2024 . All Home directories and Project shares (CIFS/SMB and NFS) may experience disconnection during the update that may cause data loss on active, open files. Please close your open files and save t

en files. Please close your open files and save them before Saturday morning. Services (e.g. webservice) that depend on this storage will also be temporarily down or unresponsive. When maintenance is completed, NFS clients should automatically resum

completed, NFS clients should automatically resume normal operation, but a reboot should help if they don’t. CIFS clients (such as Windows and MacOS) may need to remount filesystems, or simply be rebooted. [Read more…] about NetApp Fileserver Mainte

ooted. [Read more…] about NetApp Fileserver Maintenance, Saturday August 17, 2024 Tonight at 8PM, we will be performing maintenance on the network path between Soda Hall and Sutardja Dai Hall. Some Private Networks in Sutardja Dai will experience a b

web services will be migrated to new Red Hat 9 servers on Friday, July 5th beginning at 10am. This will affect people.eecs, www2.eecs, and all the project websites hosted by IRIS. This should be transparent to most people, but users of apps.eecs.be

nsparent to most people, but users of apps.eecs.berkeley.edu might have to upgrade their code due to new versions of the supported languages. These people have been previously contacted. As usual, please send any questions or concerns to help@eecs.be
